mood: Military Ops Center / Retro CRT Terminal / Gritty Survival

hierarchy.h1: text-4xl md:text-5xl font-headings uppercase tracking-widest font-bold
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl md:text-3xl font-headings uppercase tracking-wider font-semibold

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Dense, Control Room Grid. Maximum information density, zero wasted space. Optical alignment to edges.

panels_cards.header_style: border-b border-[#2a2520] bg-[#111111] p-3 flex justify-between items-center

buttons.primary: border border-[#c4841d] bg-[#c4841d]/10 text-[#c4841d] hover:bg-[#c4841d] hover:text-[#111111] hover:shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(196,132,29,0.5)] transition-all
buttons.secondary: border border-[#4a5c3a] bg-[#4a5c3a]/10 text-[#4a5c3a] hover:bg-[#4a5c3a] hover:text-[#111111] transition-all
buttons.danger: border border-[#8b3a3a] bg-[#8b3a3a]/10 text-[#8b3a3a] hover:bg-[#8b3a3a] hover:text-[#111111] transition-all

crt_scanlines.description: Global fixed overlay simulating CRT monitor scanlines.

crt_flicker.description: Subtle opacity animation on main container to simulate screen refresh.

text_glow.description: Used for live status indicators and critical narrative text.

typewriter.description: Animation for incoming AI narrative dispatches.
typewriter.implementation: Use framer-motion staggerChildren or custom React hook to reveal characters sequentially.

image_urls.description: Foggy dark landscape to be used as a heavily darkened, low-opacity background behind the main dashboard or login screen.
Dark grunge metal texture. Blend mode 'multiply' or 'overlay' with 10-20% opacity on sidebars or card backgrounds.
Analog radar aesthetic to serve as the background for the placeholder grid map component.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the dark tactical color palette. Do not use generic white or standard gray.
Import and apply 'Barlow Condensed' for headings and 'JetBrains Mono' for body/data.
Implement the CRT scanline effect as a global fixed div with pointer-events-none so it sits over the UI.
Use framer-motion to create a typewriter text effect for the 'AI Narrator Dispatches'.
All cards/panels MUST use `rounded-none`, have a 1px border (#2a2520), and an inset shadow to look like recessed terminal screens.
For the Live Server Status and Power Controls, use glowing amber/green/red dots to indicate state.
The layout must feel like a dense military ops center. Use flex-col and grid heavily. Implement collapsible sidebars for dense rosters.
All interactive elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute (e.g., `data-testid='rcon-submit-button'`).
Ensure input fields have transparent/dark backgrounds with distinct focus states matching the primary amber color.
Add Phosphor Icons or Lucide-React for technical, sharp iconography.
Never use `card` components with soft shadows or rounded corners from standard Shadcn defaults. Override them to match this tactical brutalism.
